query:
INSERT INTO service_departments (department_code, department_name, description, service_type, category, requires_disclaimer, disclaimer_type, revenue_split_laws, revenue_split_house, revenue_split_trust, display_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
('TAX_PREP', 'Tax Preparation Services', 'Tax document preparation and filing assistance. Does not constitute tax advice.', 'central', 'compliance', TRUE, 'tax_disclaimer', 60.00, 0, 40.00, 1, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('CONTRACT', 'Contract Services', 'Contract drafting, review, and management. Does not constitute legal advice.', 'central', 'compliance', TRUE, 'legal_disclaimer', 60.00, 0, 40.00, 2, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('GRANT', 'Grant Services', 'Grant research, writing, submission, and tracking assistance.', 'central', 'compliance', FALSE, NULL, 60.00, 0, 40.00, 3, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('BIZ_SETUP', 'Business Setup Services', 'Entity formation documents, EIN applications, and business registrations. Does not constitute legal advice.', 'central', 'compliance', TRUE, 'legal_disclaimer', 60.00, 0, 40.00, 4, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000);
